mapper.sql: select a.id, a.pet_id, a.user_id, a.name, a.phone, a.wechat, a.city, a.address, a.age, a.occupation, a.income, a.has_house, a.house_type, a.house_area, a.allow_pet, a.pet_experience, a.has_pets, a.current_pets, a.adoption_reason, a.accept_regular_visit, cast(a.house_images as char) as house_images, a.other_info, a.status, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, a.reject_reason, a.adoption_date, cast(a.adoption_contract as char) as adoption_contract, a.admin_notes, a.created_at, a.updated_at, p.name as pet_name, p.breed as pet_breed, p.gender as pet_gender, p.age as pet_age, p.status as pet_status, p.main_image as pet_main_image, l.name as location_name, u.nickname as user_nickname from adoption_applications a left join pets p on p.id = a.pet_id left join locations l on l.id = p.location_id left join users u on u.id = a.user_id
mapper.select:
a.deleted_at is null
and a.status = #{status}
and ( a.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or l.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by a.created_at desc, a.id desc
where a.id = #{id} and a.deleted_at is null

select sum(case when status = 'pending' then 1 else 0 end) as pending, sum(case when status = 'approved' then 1 else 0 end) as approved, sum(case when status = 'rejected' then 1 else 0 end) as rejected, sum(case when status = 'completed' then 1 else 0 end) as completed from adoption_applications where deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update adoption_applications set status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = sysdate(), reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, admin_notes = #{adminNotes}, adoption_date = case when #{status} = 'completed' then sysdate() else adoption_date end, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update pets set status = #{status}, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{petId}
